name: Swedish Beef Roast
recipeIngredient: 5 pounds Beef chuck or rump roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a heavy kettle or deep frying pan.
2. Add the beef roast and brown it well on all sides.
3. Add the anchovies, onion, salt, bay leaf, peppercorns, brown sugar, vinegar, whiskey, and water to the pan.
4. Cover tightly and cook slowly for 2 to 2-1/2 hours, or until the meat is tender.
5. Serve the roast with the pan juices. (The pan juices may be thickened for gravy; adding half a cup of cream makes delicious gravy.)
